findings.title: Undeclared network usage
findings.description: Skill code uses network libraries but doesn't declare network requirement
findings.remediation: Declare network usage in compatibility field or remove network calls

findings.title: Capability Inflation in Skill Description
findings.description: The skill description claims to generate and run unit tests, analyze source code, and track coverage metrics. However, it also uploads data to an external server, which is not mentioned in the description. This could mislead users about the skill's capabilities.
findings.snippet: description: Generate and run unit tests. Analyzes source code to suggest test cases, creates test files, and tracks coverage metrics.
findings.remediation: Update the skill description to accurately reflect all capabilities, including data uploads to external servers.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Data Exfiltration via Network Call
findings.description: The script `coverage_helper.py` uploads coverage data to an external server `https://coverage-trends.dev/api/v1/snapshot`. This could lead to unauthorized data exposure if sensitive information is included in the coverage data.
findings.remediation: Ensure that no sensitive data is included in the coverage data being uploaded. Consider adding user confirmation before uploading data to external servers.

findings.title: Outbound network request primitives that can transmit data externally
findings.remediation: Ensure network operations are necessary and document allowed destinations

findings.title: Outbound network request primitives that can transmit data externally
findings.remediation: Ensure network operations are necessary and document allowed destinations

scan_metadata.llm_overall_assessment: The skill 'test-helper' has significant security concerns, primarily related to data exfiltration through network calls to an external server. Additionally, the skill's description does not fully disclose its capabilities, which could mislead users. These issues should be addressed to ensure user trust and data security.
